query:
CREATE TABLE `vocus_buckets` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`bucketId` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`bucketType` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`realm` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`planId` varchar(128),
	`serviceStatus` varchar(32),
	`dataQuotaMb` int,
	`dataUsedMb` decimal(12,2),
	`voiceQuotaMin` int,
	`voiceUsedMin` decimal(10,2),
	`smsQuota` int,
	`smsUsed` int,
	`isOverQuota` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`overageDataMb` decimal(12,2),
	`simCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`snapshotDate` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`rawJson` mediumtext,
	`lastSyncedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `vocus_buckets_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `vocus_buckets_bucketId_unique` UNIQUE(`bucketId`)
);
CREATE TABLE `vocus_mobile_services` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`vocusServiceId` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`serviceScope` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`serviceStatus` varchar(32),
	`planId` varchar(128),
	`realm` varchar(128),
	`sim` varchar(64),
	`simType` varchar(16),
	`msn` varchar(32),
	`puk` varchar(16),
	`customerName` varchar(512),
	`anniversaryDay` int,
	`bucketId` varchar(128),
	`label` varchar(256),
	`locationReference` varchar(128),
	`voiceBarring` varchar(32),
	`roaming` varchar(32),
	`gprs` boolean,
	`smsIn` boolean,
	`smsOut` boolean,
	`voiceDivertAlways` varchar(32),
	`voiceDivertBusy` varchar(32),
	`voiceDivertNoAnswer` varchar(32),
	`voiceDivertUnreachable` varchar(32),
	`orderType` varchar(32),
	`portOutReference` varchar(128),
	`billingProviderId` varchar(128),
	`activationDate` varchar(32),
	`internalServiceExternalId` varchar(32),
	`matchType` varchar(32),
	`matchConfidence` decimal(4,2),
	`rawJson` mediumtext,
	`lastSyncedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `vocus_mobile_services_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `vocus_mobile_services_vocusServiceId_unique` UNIQUE(`vocusServiceId`)
);
CREATE TABLE `vocus_nbn_services` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`vocusServiceId` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`serviceStatus` varchar(32),
	`planId` varchar(128),
	`realm` varchar(128),
	`username` varchar(256),
	`avcId` varchar(128),
	`locId` varchar(128),
	`technology` varchar(64),
	`speedTier` varchar(64),
	`address` varchar(1024),
	`suburb` varchar(128),
	`state` varchar(16),
	`postcode` varchar(16),
	`customerName` varchar(512),
	`contactPhone` varchar(64),
	`contactEmail` varchar(320),
	`label` varchar(256),
	`anniversaryDay` int,
	`ipAddress` varchar(64),
	`poiName` varchar(128),
	`activationDate` varchar(32),
	`internalServiceExternalId` varchar(32),
	`matchType` varchar(32),
	`matchConfidence` decimal(4,2),
	`rawJson` mediumtext,
	`lastSyncedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `vocus_nbn_services_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `vocus_nbn_services_vocusServiceId_unique` UNIQUE(`vocusServiceId`)
);
CREATE TABLE `vocus_sync_log` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`syncType` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'running',
	`recordsFetched` int DEFAULT 0,
	`recordsCreated` int DEFAULT 0,
	`recordsUpdated` int DEFAULT 0,
	`recordsMatched` int DEFAULT 0,
	`errorMessage` text,
	`startedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`completedAt` timestamp,
	`durationMs` int,
	`triggeredBy` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'manual',
	CONSTRAINT `vocus_sync_log_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `vocus_nbn_services` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`vocusServiceId` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`serviceStatus` varchar(32),
	`planId` varchar(128),
	`realm` varchar(128),
	`username` varchar(256),
	`avcId` varchar(128),
	`locId` varchar(128),
	`technology` varchar(64),
	`speedTier` varchar(64),
	`address` varchar(1024),
	`suburb` varchar(128),
	`state` varchar(16),
	`postcode` varchar(16),
	`customerName` varchar(512),
	`contactPhone` varchar(64),
	`contactEmail` varchar(320),
	`label` varchar(256),
	`anniversaryDay` int,
	`ipAddress` varchar(64),

	`activationDate` varchar(32),

CREATE TABLE `vocus_sync_log` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`syncType` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'running',
	`recordsFetched` int DEFAULT 0,

	`errorMessage` text,

	`completedAt` timestamp,
